claims.summary: Continuity recaps must preserve felt anchors even when a description does not use one canonical keyword.
claims.disposition: verify quoted/emphasized, novel-metaphor, texture-family, terminal-anchor, and prefix-fallback tests

claims.summary: Resonance, friction, persistence, viscosity, pressure gradient, and shadow texture should survive bounded recap extraction.
Stale or low-signal material must not displace current high-signal continuity.
claims.disposition: verify freshness, afterimage threshold, low-signal overflow, and bounded-history tests
